title: Rockstar announces details of GTA 6: $80 price, editions, pre-orders, and PS5 exclusive features
summary: Grand Theft Auto 6 will launch in November at $80, with a $100 Ultimate Edition and no disc in the box, while improvements on PS5 Pro and the absence of GTA Online at launch are confirmed.

title: Valve releases SteamOS so anyone can build their own Steam Machine
summary: Valve releases the SteamOS operating system so that manufacturers and users can assemble their own consoles, although it admits that the price of the official Steam Machine is higher than desired.

title: Star Fox for Switch 2 reviews highlight a faithful return to the N64 classic
summary: The Star Fox remake for Switch 2 receives positive reviews that praise its aerial gameplay, although they note that it stays within the rails of the original.

title: Kadokawa CEO survives shareholder removal attempt over handling of Elden Ring
summary: Investors of FromSoftware's parent company sought to remove the CEO due to disagreements over Elden Ring profits, but the executive remains in position.

title: Sony tightens rules against shovelware on PlayStation Store
summary: Sony applies stricter guidelines to remove low-quality games on PS5, which has led to some developers leaving the platform.

title: Xbox tests new features to facilitate game updates
summary: Microsoft experiments with improvements to the update system and adds a nostalgic Xbox 360 interface for a smoother experience.

title: Sega launches Genesis cartridges with original Sonic games for $100
summary: Sega markets physical editions of classic Sonic games on Mega Drive cartridges, aimed at collectors.

title: Azure Striker Gunvolt Trilogy Enhanced confirms its launch on Switch 2 for October
summary: The enhanced version of the Azure Striker Gunvolt trilogy will arrive on Nintendo Switch 2 on October 22 with a free update for owners of the original.

title: 007 First Light advances in its development for Switch 2
summary: The James Bond game 007 First Light is progressing well in its adaptation for Switch 2, according to reports close to the project.

title: The Everyday Wonders expansion of Pokémon TCG Pocket arrives on June 29
summary: The new expansion of the Pokémon card game for mobile will add more cards and thematic content.

title: Diablo 4 announces details of its next season and a collaboration with Overwatch
summary: Blizzard reveals the new season of Diablo 4, which includes a free trial of the Wizard and a collaboration with Overwatch, while players express their discontent.

title: Tim Sweeney analyzes the future of multiplayer games and competition in the industry
summary: The CEO of Epic Games, Tim Sweeney, talks about why new multiplayer games fail and assures that there will be no absolute monopoly in the market.

title: Tekken arrives on Switch 2 via Arcade Archives 2
summary: The classic fighting game Tekken will be available on Nintendo Switch 2 on June 25 as part of the Arcade Archives 2 series.

title: The One Piece remake releases trailer and premiere date on Netflix
summary: The new anime adaptation of One Piece shows its first trailer in three years and confirms its launch on Netflix.

title: God of War: Laufey would have release window according to reliable source
summary: The long-awaited God of War title focused on Laufey could be announced soon, following a pattern of Sony releases.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved will be a board game arriving in 2026
summary: The Halo universe expands with a board game based on the original campaign, scheduled for 2026.

title: X-Men '97 reveals episode schedule for its second season
summary: The Marvel animated series announces the dates and titles of the season 2 episodes, continuing the adventures of the mutants.

title: Supergirl reviews highlight Milly Alcock's performance but divide opinions
summary: The Supergirl movie receives reviews that praise the work of its lead while other aspects of the film generate debate.

title: Overwatch players protest the high price of new skins
summary: The Overwatch community complains about the excessive cost of newly released cosmetics, demanding fairer prices from Blizzard.

title: Baldur's Gate 1 and 2 receive an unexpected update years after release
summary: The iconic role-playing games Baldur's Gate 1 and 2 get a patch that includes technical improvements and additional content.
